description: Key West Florida has the most equable climate in the country with an average range of only 14 Farenheit VOL LXXXI No 171 Here and There OPERATION PETTICOAT segments of which were shot lo cally early last year has broken an all time record in terms of boxoffice draw The Cary Grant Tony Curtis picture has grossed over eight million dollars in just the United States and Canada making it the most successful comedy to date THE TURKISH SUBMARINE Hizirreis S344 arrived in Key West last week for a twoweek visit Hizirreis is the exUSS Me ro SS378 and was transferred to the Turkish Navy under the Mutual Assistance Program on April 20 at San Francisco Hizirreis is commanded by Lieutenant Commander Recep Ul gen Turkish Navy and has a crew of eight officers and about 72 men During their stay in Key West they will undertake a training program under the supervision of Commander Submarine Squadron 12 AIR ANTISUBMARINE Squa dron 935 commanded by Com mander Paul R Hunter will com mence two weeks of active duty training at the Naval Air Station Key West on July 25 They will be conducting anti submarine warfare training ex ercises with
